queries.question: Provide me the section names which are common to all statements
queries.sql: SELECT Sections.SectionName  from Financial_Statements_Sections join Sections on Financial_Statements_Sections.Section_id = Sections.id join Financial_Statements on Financial_Statements_Sections.Financial_Statement_id = Financial_Statements.id   GROUP BY Financial_Statements_Sections.Section_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Financial_Statements_Sections.Financial_Statement_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Financial_Statements)

queries.question: For each statement, provide me the section names it contains
queries.sql: select financial_statements.name , sections.sectionname from Financial_Statements_Sections join Sections on Financial_Statements_Sections.Section_id = Sections.id join Financial_Statements on Financial_Statements_Sections.Financial_Statement_id = Financial_Statements.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?sectionname WHERE {
  ?financial_statements_sections a :Financial_Statements_Sections .
  ?sections a :Sections .
  ?financial_statements_sections p:hasSections ?sections .
  ?financial_statements a :Financial_Statements .
  ?financial_statements_sections p:hasFinancial_Statements ?financial_statements .
  ?financial_statements p:name ?name .
  ?sections p:SectionName ?sectionname .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What section names do we have for every statement
